customer_feedback.text: The onboarding flow takes too long. Users drop off after step 3 because they have to verify email before they can try the product.
Password reset emails are going to spam. When they do arrive, the link expires too quickly — 15 minutes is not enough.
We love the product but the notification system is overwhelming. Every Jira update triggers a Slack message and an email. We need granular controls.
Finding past decisions is impossible. We can't search across Slack and Jira at the same time. We lose context every sprint.
Account recovery when MFA device is lost is a nightmare. We've had 3 employees locked out for over a week.
Payment failure rate is up 12% this month. Root cause appears to be a timeout bug in the Stripe webhook handler introduced in v2.3.1.
Withdrawal tracking is manual. Our finance team exports CSVs and reconciles in Excel. A real-time dashboard would save 4 hours per week.
The dark mode request has been in the backlog for two years. It's a deal-breaker for our design team working late nights.
Linking multiple accounts (personal + work) under one organization profile is broken. Users get logged out when switching.
We want an AI assistant that can summarize our weekly Jira board and surface blockers before standup. Would replace our current manual process.
Our finance team spends 6 hours every month reconciling withdrawal records manually. We need automated categorization and real-time balance snapshots.
We referred three colleagues and got no confirmation it worked. The referral flow is confusing and there's no visibility into reward status.
Dark mode is essential for our developers. The current bright UI causes eye strain during long sessions. Three team members raised this as a renewal blocker.
Switching between personal and company accounts requires re-authentication every time. Account linking is broken on Safari — it logs us out mid-session.
Pilot users of the AI assistant loved Jira summarization but found it too verbose. They want a 3-bullet standup brief, not a full summary paragraph.
Onboarding completion dropped again last month. New users say the setup wizard is confusing without a progress bar or estimated time.
Search results mix old archived tickets with active ones. We need date filters and a way to exclude archived items.

jira_tickets.title: Onboarding step 3 drop-off investigation
jira_tickets.description: Analytics show 47% of users abandon onboarding at the email verification step. Investigate removing mandatory verification before first use.

jira_tickets.title: Password reset link expiry — extend to 60 min
jira_tickets.description: Current 15-minute expiry causing support load. Extend to 60 minutes and add resend capability.

jira_tickets.title: Notification preference center
jira_tickets.description: Users need per-channel, per-event notification controls. Currently all-or-nothing.

jira_tickets.title: Cross-tool search (Slack + Jira unified)
jira_tickets.description: Design unified search index across Slack threads, Jira tickets, and Confluence docs.

jira_tickets.title: MFA recovery flow redesign
jira_tickets.description: Current MFA recovery requires IT admin intervention. Design self-service backup codes flow.

jira_tickets.title: Stripe webhook timeout fix
jira_tickets.description: Webhook handler introduced in v2.3.1 has 5s timeout. Payments failing silently. Fix timeout to 30s and add retry logic.

jira_tickets.title: Dark mode implementation
jira_tickets.description: System-wide dark mode following OS preference. Requires design system token audit.

jira_tickets.title: Referral program feature
jira_tickets.description: Product-led referral program. User shares link, both get 30-day free extension. Track attribution.

jira_tickets.title: Withdrawal dashboard — real-time balance tracking
jira_tickets.description: Design real-time withdrawal dashboard with auto-categorization and CSV export. Target: reduce finance reconciliation time by 80%.

jira_tickets.title: Referral attribution tracking fix
jira_tickets.description: Fix referral cookie expiry bug — cookies expire before signup completes. Add referral status page for reward visibility.

jira_tickets.title: Multi-account session persistence fix
jira_tickets.description: Safari SameSite cookie policy breaks session when switching accounts. Fix cookie scope and implement silent token refresh.

jira_tickets.title: AI standup brief — compact 3-bullet format
jira_tickets.description: Add 'brief mode' to AI Jira summary — output 3 bullets: blockers, progress, next. Driven by pilot user feedback.

jira_tickets.title: Onboarding progress bar + time estimate
jira_tickets.description: Add progress bar (step X of Y) and estimated completion time to onboarding wizard. Address NPS feedback on setup confusion.

historical_prds.title: Onboarding Redesign v1
historical_prds.summary: Reduced onboarding steps from 7 to 4. Moved email verification to post-first-use. Result: 22% improvement in completion rate.
key_decisions: Defer email verification to reduce friction
In-app tooltip guidance instead of separate onboarding modal

historical_prds.title: Authentication Security Upgrade
historical_prds.summary: Added MFA support (TOTP + SMS). Introduced session management dashboard. Resolved 3 CVEs.
key_decisions: TOTP preferred over SMS for security
Session dashboard gives users visibility into active sessions
Force re-auth after 30 days of inactivity

historical_prds.title: Payments Infrastructure v2
historical_prds.summary: Migrated from Stripe v2 to v3 API. Added webhook retry logic. Reduced payment failure rate from 4.2% to 1.1%.
key_decisions: Idempotency keys on all payment requests

historical_prds.title: Notification Preference Center v1
historical_prds.summary: Scoped per-channel notification controls. Cancelled due to engineering capacity constraints in Q3. Requirements documented for Q1 2025 restart.
key_decisions: Digest mode as alternative to real-time

historical_prds.title: AI Standup Assistant — Pilot Spec
historical_prds.summary: AI-powered daily standup brief: pulls Jira board, identifies blockers, formats 3-bullet output. Pilot with 5 enterprise customers planned for Q1 2025.
key_decisions: Jira-only scope for pilot (Slack integration in v2)
User can regenerate brief with single click

competitor_intel.notable: Recently acquired by a larger platform — roadmap uncertain
Strong in SMB; lacks depth for enterprise workflows

strategic_priorities: Begin AI assistant pilot with 5 enterprise customers
Fix multi-account session bugs blocking Safari users
roadmap_context.north_star_metric: Weekly Active Users who complete at least one core workflow
roadmap_context.team_capacity: Engineering: 8 FTEs, Design: 2 FTEs, Q1 budget headcount locked
